items.name: aide
items.description: Framework and extensions for agentic orchestration.

items.name: aceai
items.description: An engineering-first agent framework that puts infrastructure before applications.

items.name: Miyabi_AI_Agent
items.description: 🤖 Enhance AI capabilities by mastering prompt design, tool structuring, and hook creation with the Miyabi AI Agent framework.

items.name: agent-red-team
items.description: Security testing framework for autonomous AI agents. Detects privilege escalation vulnerabilities in LLM agents before they reach production.

items.name: DataLogicEngine
items.description: Enterprise AI platform built on the Universal Knowledge Graph (UKG), featuring a 17-Axis Knowledge Framework, 10-Layer Truth Engine, multi-agent orchestration, GraphRAG, MCP integration, explainable reasoning, governance, compliance, and end-to-end audit traceability.

items.name: omnigent
items.description: Omnigent is an open-source AI agent framework and meta-harness: orchestrate Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, Pi, and custom agents — swap harnesses without rewriting, enforce policies and sandboxing, and collaborate in real time from any device.

items.name: agent-CE
items.description: 🌐 Streamline web agent evaluations with Agent-CE, a containerized platform offering integrated frameworks and CI/CD support for efficient performance assessment.

items.name: w5-football-prediction
items.description: ⚽ Predict football match outcomes using the W-5 Multi-Agent AI Consensus Framework, achieving high accuracy with a blend of AI and machine learning techniques.

items.name: agent-hooks
items.description: One local callback layer for Claude Code and Codex: a macOS-ready CLI for native permission dialogs and notifications, plus a FastAPI-like Python framework
